race.comment: FINANCE WORK (4) looks very well placed at his third career start having made good improvement off a solid debut, getting into second over this track and distance. No reason he can't improve again and with even luck from a wide gate he can get the job done. I'M SAVVY AS (7) has placed in both runs back from a spell, in a good maiden fresh at Sale. He maps for every chance up on speed here and will give a sight. PATH OF HEROES (11) wasn't far away first up at Sale in a bunched finish. He should be better for that and take beating. LAST PIECE (13) has had a few chances as a 21 start maiden but has claims on best form. GIVE HER TIME (12) was okay here fresh off a long break. She should come on plenty from that run and is in the mix.
